name: Blumgi Merge
author: Poki
description: Blumgi Merge is a merge adventure game where your goal is to combine slimes to make them stronger. By merging two slimes, you create a more powerful slime with new looks and weapons. Use your slimes to fight waves of monsters as you progress through the dungeon. Defeating monsters earns you money, which you can use to buy even more slimes. Keep merging, fighting, and upgrading to conquer tougher enemies and see if you have what it takes to beat the dungeon! How to play Blumgi Merge? Use the mouse or tap to buy, merge and fight with your slimes! Who created Blumgi Merge? Blumgi Merge was created by Blumgi. Play their other games on Poki: Blumgi Slime , Blumgi Paintball and Blumgi Soccer ! How can I play Blumgi Merge for free? You can play Blumgi Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Blumgi Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Blumgi Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
